vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix tokenizer out of vocab size
vllm.author: esmeetu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #340
This PR apply this comment's solution: #340 (comment)
When the new token id is out of vocab size, we will regard it as an empty string.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Command-R Max Model Length
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, the max context window for CohereForAI/c4ai-command-r-v01 is not defined by max_position_embeddings but a special model_max_length key instead. This has been discussed in these two threads: 1, 2
We still use max_position_embeddings as default max_model_len for the memory concern, but when

vllm.title: [BugFix] Use consistent logger everywhere
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I noticed some files where the centrally-configured logger wasn't being used.

vllm.title: [Core][Bugfix] cache len of tokenizer
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Computing len of tokenizer is extremely expensive:
    def __len__(self):
        """
        Size of the full vocabulary with the added tokens. Counts the `keys` and not the `values` because otherwise if
        there is a hole in the vocab, we will add tokenizers at a wrong index.
        """

vllm.title: Fix build when nvtools is missing
vllm.author: bnellnm
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Rather than adding all the TORCH_LIBRARIES to a target explicitly, we add a dependency on the torch target and torch_python_LIBRARY.  This should allow cmake to pick up the dependencies of torch and torch_python_LIBRARY without the need to explicitly enumerate them.  Since nvtools is not required, i

vllm.title: CMake build elf without PTX
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Without this -real flag, the output binary includes PTX for all code architecture we are generating, which in turns double the size.
https://cmake.org/cmake/help/latest/prop_tgt/CUDA_ARCHITECTURES.html#examples
